title: Head of Revenue Operations
description: Finout, a cloud cost-management B2B SaaS company with 100+ employees across Tel Aviv and New York, seeks a Head of Revenue Operations reporting to the CRO. The role requires 7+ years in RevOps, Sales Ops, or Strategy in high-growth B2B SaaS, with proven experience scaling beyond $30M+ ARR. Candidates need deep Salesforce administration and revenue analytics expertise, strong cross-functional leadership across Sales, Marketing, Finance and HR, and a leader-doer builder mentality comfortable owning strategy and building flows, dashboards, and data models for globally distributed teams.
score_reason: Omri's 15+ years in B2B SaaS RevOps with proven expertise in Salesforce, pipeline forecasting, and cross-functional GTM leadership directly matches Finout's need for a strategic RevOps leader scaling beyond $30M ARR. The role aligns perfectly with his target positions and the fintech/cloud infrastructure space leverages his strong fit profile.
ai_opener: Omri, I came across Finout's Head of RevOps opening and your background immediately stood out—scaling revenue operations across globally distributed teams in high-growth B2B SaaS is exactly what they're building for. Your track record with Salesforce architecture and revenue analytics could be transformative for Finout's GTM motion as they scale beyond $30M ARR.

title: RevOps Manager
description: Platomics, a healthcare-focused company, seeks a Revenue Operations Manager to be the backbone of its revenue engine. You'll design, optimize, and document workflows across sales, marketing, and customer success, build dashboards, analyze funnel metrics, administer the CRM (HubSpot), and support forecasting, territory planning, and quota setting. Certifications in Salesforce, HubSpot, or RevOps and experience with project-management tools are valued. Offers a remote-flexible role anywhere in Europe with a competitive salary.
score_reason: Strong alignment with RevOps Manager role, HubSpot expertise, and GTM workflow optimization. Healthcare B2B SaaS is a solid vertical fit, though fintech background is stronger. Remote-flexible Europe aligns with candidate's global remote preference.
ai_opener: I noticed Platomics is building a revenue engine in healthcare—a space where GTM rigor directly impacts patient outcomes. With 15+ years optimizing B2B SaaS revenue stacks (HubSpot, Salesforce, pipeline forecasting, territory planning), I've scaled similar workflows across sales, marketing, and CS. I'd love to explore how my experience architecting revenue operations at scale could accelerate Platomics' growth trajectory.

title: RevOps Expert
description: Remote, a fully distributed global employment platform, is hiring a RevOps Expert to optimize sales processes and system architecture. You'll drive strategic initiatives aligned with GTM strategy, champion scalable process design, and implement solutions using Six Sigma and Agile methodologies. Requires extensive operations-management experience, deep Salesforce expertise, familiarity with tools like LeanData, Zapier, and Camunda, strong root-cause analysis skills, and SaaS/B2B experience. Fully remote with no relocation required.
score_reason: Strong alignment with core RevOps competencies (Salesforce, process optimization, GTM strategy, B2B SaaS). Remote location is ideal. Minor consideration: Six Sigma/Camunda/LeanData expertise not explicitly mentioned in candidate profile, though operations background suggests capability to quickly master these.
ai_opener: Hi Omri - I came across Remote's RevOps Expert opening and it immediately resonated with your background. You've spent 15+ years building scalable GTM operations in B2B SaaS, and Remote's focus on process architecture and Salesforce-driven optimization aligns perfectly with your core strengths. I'd love to explore how your pipeline forecasting and systems design expertise could help them optimize their distributed sales infrastructure.

title: RevOps Manager, Territory Strategy & Operations
description: Gong, a revenue-intelligence B2B SaaS leader, seeks a RevOps Manager focused on Territory Strategy & Operations to accelerate revenue growth and seller productivity through data-driven investment strategy and scalable territory design. You'll redesign territory models for global scalability, partner with Sales leadership, Strategy, and Finance to optimize territory composition, and serve as a key partner providing dashboards and regional insights. Requires strong cross-functional collaboration and comfort navigating ambiguity in a high-growth environment. Salary range $149,000–$175,000.
score_reason: Exceptional match—RevOps Manager role at a tier-1 B2B SaaS revenue-intelligence platform aligns perfectly with Omri's core expertise in GTM strategy, territory optimization, and data-driven pipeline forecasting. Remote US role removes location friction, and the cross-functional strategy work (Sales, Finance, dashboards) is ideal for a senior RevOps executive.
ai_opener: Omri here—I've spent 15+ years building revenue operations and GTM infrastructure for high-growth B2B SaaS, and Gong's focus on territory strategy and seller productivity through data intelligence resonates deeply. With a track record of designing scalable territory models and partnering cross-functionally to optimize revenue outcomes, I'm excited to explore how I can accelerate growth at a platform that's reshaping how revenue teams operate.

title: Revenue Operations Manager - Systems
description: Flex seeks a Revenue Operations Manager – Systems to build and own the Salesforce environment for its New Verticals division. Requires 5+ years in Revenue, Sales, or GTM Operations with 2+ years in a senior capacity, deep Salesforce configuration expertise, and demonstrated experience standing up RevOps infrastructure for a scaling business unit. You'll architect the sales process, build integrations and dashboards, and ensure data integrity. Familiarity with Outreach, LeanData, Clay, and HubSpot is valued, with a builder mentality energized by creating from zero.
score_reason: Omri's 15+ years in B2B SaaS RevOps with deep Salesforce expertise directly matches the core requirements. The 'builder from zero' mentality aligns perfectly with architecting a new division's infrastructure, though the New York hybrid location requires confirmation of remote flexibility.
ai_opener: Flex's New Verticals division is exactly the kind of greenfield Salesforce build that leverages my sweet spot—I've spent 15 years architecting RevOps infrastructure for scaling B2B SaaS businesses, and I'm energized by owning the full stack from process design through integrations and data governance. Your emphasis on LeanData and Outreach integration resonates; I've built similar tech stacks that scaled CAC/LTV visibility across multiple business units. I'd love to explore how my experience standing up RevOps from the ground up could accelerate your new division's go-to-market velocity.

title: GTM Engineer
description: Pylon seeks a GTM Engineer to test, implement, and optimize an AI outbound solution from setup through ongoing performance tuning. You'll build and manage automated outbound sequences ensuring deliverability and personalization at scale, own email-marketing infrastructure including domain health and warming strategies, create data pipelines between marketing tools, CRM and sales tooling, collaborate with RevOps on lead scoring and routing, and ship growth experiments. Requires 3+ years in marketing operations or GTM engineering at B2B SaaS companies, with strong technical skills across APIs and webhooks.

Technical depth in APIs/webhooks and data pipeline orchestration matches requirements, though role skews slightly more hands-on technical than typical senior executive profile.
ai_opener: Omri here—I've spent 15+ years building GTM infrastructure at scale in B2B SaaS, and Pylon's approach to AI-native outbound automation caught my attention. The convergence of deliverability engineering, lead scoring logic, and experimental velocity you're describing is exactly the operational leverage I've been architecting—particularly interested in how you're solving the personalization-at-scale problem without destroying sender reputation.

title: GTM Engineer
description: Conveo, an AI research platform enabling fast, affordable, high-quality consumer/B2B research used by global brands like Unilever, Google, and Orange, seeks a GTM Engineer who can code, ship, and iterate on internal tools and automations. You'll replace patchwork SaaS tools and manual workflows with purpose-built apps, pipelines, and AI-powered workflows—lead-scoring models that learn, attribution pipelines, onboarding flows, and AI agents that eliminate manual work. Ideal for a technical builder thriving in a hyper-growth environment scaling rapidly.
score_reason: Strong alignment on GTM/RevOps automation and AI-native workflows, but the role's emphasis on coding and building internal tools (rather than strategy/leadership) is below Omri's seniority level. Better suited for a GTM Engineer IC than a senior executive seeking Head of Revenue Operations roles.
ai_opener: Omri here—your vision of replacing patchwork SaaS with AI-powered GTM workflows resonates deeply. I've built lead-scoring models, attribution pipelines, and automated onboarding at scale in B2B SaaS, and I'm intrigued by Conveo's approach to embedding intelligence into research workflows. Given your rapid scaling, I'd love to explore how RevOps architecture and GTM automation could accelerate your expansion with global brands.

title: GTM Engineer

title: Head of Growth Marketing
